english.headline: Number 13 Flies High in Kardinya
english.commentator: What a day out there from number 13 — Alek is having a great game out here at Alan Edwards Park in Kardinya! He flew up for an absolute specky in the first quarter and brought the crowd to their feet, and that mark led straight to a goal for his team. The orange boots deliver again — Alek kicks truly! That's his first goal of the season and a brand new personal best with 8 points — he's already raising the bar! Keep working on that kicking power and those goals are going to keep piling up, number 13!
